features: sales_categories.location_id is repaired before location-scoped catalog queries
database schema revision is bumped so legacy D1 databases cannot skip the migration
Edge can self-heal the missing column during staged deployments even before the new Core is active
customer-facing location buttons no longer show internal plan counts
all previous dual-panel, native keyboard and cascading billing capabilities are preserved

deployment.automatic_provisioning: upload ZIP through the central bot

validation.legacy_schema_migration: passed: missing sales_categories.location_id was added and shared legacy category split safely
validation.location_button_labels: passed: internal plans_count removed from customer-facing location labels
validation.live_api: not run; requires real D1, Telegram and panel credentials

limitations: Live integration was not executed because real credentials and production D1 are unavailable in this environment.
title: رفع مهاجرت کاتالوگ لوکیشن و حذف اعداد کنار لوکیشن
summary: ستون location_id روی دیتابیس‌های قدیمی به‌صورت اجباری و دفاعی ساخته می‌شود و نام لوکیشن‌های خرید بدون شمارنده داخلی نمایش داده می‌شود.
changes: رفع D1_ERROR: no such column: c.location_id هنگام انتخاب لوکیشن.
افزایش نسخه ساختار دیتابیس و بررسی مستقیم PRAGMA قبل از اعتماد به schema marker.
افزودن self-heal در Edge برای ساخت ستون location_id در Deploy مرحله‌ای.
حذف تعداد پلن از کنار نام لوکیشن در کیبورد خرید.
